record.field: The candidate confirmed the interview schedule but failed to attend multiple times without prior notice.
The candidate provided inaccurate information in the CV, application documents, or during the interview process.
The candidate showed disrespectful language or behavior toward HR, interviewers, or the recruitment process.
The candidate confirmed the job offer but did not attend the onboarding date and did not provide any notice.
The candidate failed to complete required recruitment steps such as submitting additional documents, confirming information, following interview instructions, or completing assessments.
